name: io.github.codespar/mcp-zoop
description: Marketplace payments, split rules, sellers — Zoop API

tools.name: create_transaction
tools.description: Create a transaction in Zoop (Pix, boleto, or credit card)

tools.name: get_transaction
tools.description: Get transaction details by ID

tools.name: list_transactions
tools.description: List transactions with optional filters

tools.name: create_split_rule
tools.description: Create a split rule for distributing payments between sellers

tools.name: create_seller
tools.description: Create a seller (individual or business) in the marketplace

tools.name: get_seller
tools.description: Get seller details by ID

tools.name: list_sellers
tools.description: List sellers in the marketplace

tools.name: create_buyer
tools.description: Create a buyer in the marketplace

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: Get balance for a seller or the marketplace

tools.name: create_transfer
tools.description: Create a transfer to a seller's bank account

tools.name: refund_transaction
tools.description: Refund a transaction (full or partial)

tools.name: get_receivables
tools.description: Get receivables for a transaction

tools.name: create_token_card
tools.description: Tokenize a credit card for secure payments

tools.name: create_bank_account
tools.description: Create a bank account token for a seller

tools.name: get_seller_balance
tools.description: Get detailed balance for a specific seller

tools.name: update_seller
tools.description: Update seller information

tools.name: list_transfers
tools.description: List marketplace transfers with filters

tools.name: get_transfer
tools.description: Get transfer details by ID

tools.name: create_subscription
tools.description: Create a recurring subscription

tools.name: list_receivables
tools.description: List all receivables for the marketplace
